description: ref with pass_parent_env=true; check var inheritance
yaml:
collection: "FSRPB Render Path Probe"
description: "render-path probe collection"
playbooks:
  - name: "rp_ref_envT_child"
    description: "child for rp_ref_envT_parent"
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - name: "ChildStart"
        type: start
        next: "Echo"
      - name: "Echo"
        type: set_variable
        vars:
          child_marker:    "from_child"
          saw_parent:      "{{ vars.parent_marker | default('NONE') }}"
  - name: "rp_ref_envT_parent"
    description: "parent sets var, child reads + writes, parent reads back"
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - name: "Trigger"
        type: start
        next: "SetParentVar"
      - name: "SetParentVar"
        type: set_variable
        vars:
          parent_marker: "from_parent"
        next: "Call"
      - name: "Call"
        type: workflow_reference
        arguments:
          target: rp_ref_envT_child
          apply_async: false
          pass_parent_env: true
          pass_input_record: false
        next: "Capture"
      - name: "Capture"
        type: set_variable
        vars:
          saw_child_write: "{{ vars.child_marker | default('UNSET') }}"
          child_step_view: "{{ vars.steps.Call }}"
